[?2004l[?2004h

cd /workspace/YatCC && cat /tmp/test2_out.ll
[?2004l; ModuleID = '/tmp/test2.ll'
source_filename = "/tmp/test2.ll"

define i32 @main(i32 %x) {
entry:
  %cmp = icmp slt i32 %x, 0
  br i1 %cmp, label %a, label %b

a:                                                ; preds = %entry
  br label %merge

b:                                                ; preds = %entry
  br label %merge

merge:                                            ; preds = %b, %a
  %phi = phi i32 [ 1, %a ], [ 2, %b ]
  ret i32 %phi
}
[?2004h
